LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidth.description: Arachne Swarm Tower Network's maximum node limit. Each Arachne queen will impact network load, some tribes share the burden of network pressure while others increase it. When the load is too high, the Arachne queen's mental state and consciousness may decrease.
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidth.label: Hive Network Capacity
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidthCost.description: Aranea Crawler's impact on Format Tower bandwidth, if negative, represents the crawler sharing network load.
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidthCost.label: Hive Network Load
LanguageData.ARA_IcezKillingFactor.description: The percentage of the body part's health required to break it due to freezing damage
LanguageData.ARA_IcezKillingFactor.label: Ice Kill Threshold
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationCost.description: The cost of incubating this armed organ/tissue in terms of total nutrition
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationCost.label: Incubation cost in nutrients
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationSpeedFactor.description: Incubation speed multiplier for the hatchery.
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationSpeedFactor.label: Incubation Speed Factor
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationTime.description: The incubation time for this armed organ or tissue is
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationTime.label: Incubation Time
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Cooldown_Delay.descriptio: When Alakne's Swarm Spell ability is used by the species, its mana load will start to decrease gradually after this time. Any casting will reset the cooldown.
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Cooldown_Delay.label: Mana Nerve Chain Cooldown Delay (seconds)
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Level.label: Level of Spell
LanguageData.NutrientTransmissionEfficiency.descripti: Reduce the fuel consumption when transmitting biomass. The final amount will be multiplied by (1 - efficiency).
LanguageData.NutrientTransmissionEfficiency.label: Biological mass transmission efficiency
